title: Error fetching from Google Gemini API through proxy
symptom: When attempting to connect to the Google Gemini API via a proxy, n8n throws an error indicating it cannot fetch from the specified URL.
not_this_if: Direct connection to the internet without a proxy
root_cause: The error occurs because the proxy settings may not allow traffic to the Google Gemini API endpoints. Firewall rules may also block the necessary connections, preventing n8n from fetching data from the API.
fix_steps: Create a firewall policy to allow traffic to the Google Gemini API addresses.
Ensure that the proxy settings in n8n are correctly configured to route requests to the API.
agent_instruction: Set up firewall rules to allow access to the Google Gemini API through your proxy.
